title: TZ-9 load experience runtime
objective:
Read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md first. Create file governance/runtime/experience_loader.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations
import json
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

EXPERIENCE_REGISTRY=Path('governance/state/experience_registry.json')

def load_experience(scope:str|None=None)->list[dict[str,Any]]:
    if not EXPERIENCE_REGISTRY.exists():
        return []
    data=json.loads(EXPERIENCE_REGISTRY.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    lessons=data.get('lessons',data if isinstance(data,list) else [])
    if scope is None:
        return lessons if isinstance(lessons,list) else []
    return [item for item in lessons if isinstance(item,dict) and (item.get('scope')==scope or scope in item.get('applies_to',[]))]

if __name__=='__main__':
    print(json.dumps({'experience_count':len(load_experience()),'release_pass':False},ensure_ascii=False,sort_keys=True))

Create file governance/runners/analyst_experience_stage_runner.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations
import json
from governance.runtime.experience_loader import load_experience
RUNNER_ID='analyst_experience_stage_runner'
READINESS_LEVEL='STUB_RUNNABLE'
def main()->int:
    lessons=load_experience('analyst')
    print(json.dumps({'runner_id':RUNNER_ID,'readiness_level':READINESS_LEVEL,'experience_loaded':True,'experience_count':len(lessons),'release_pass':False},ensure_ascii=False,sort_keys=True))
    return 0
if __name__=='__main__': raise SystemExit(main())
